messages.content:
中译英：个人展望	
	香港是一个具有开放性和多元文化的国际化城市，一直以来都是世界金融中心和国际贸易枢纽，我心生向往。希望能为香港的金融行业贡献我的知识与经验，为香港的金融业带来更专业和高效的服务，实现自身的事业发展和价值提升

Personal Prospect

Hong Kong is an international city known for its openness and multiculturalism. It has always been a global financial center and international trading hub, which has intrigued me. I hope to contribute my knowledge and experience to the financial industry in Hong Kong, to provide more professional and efficient services, and to achieve personal career development and value enhancement.

润色如下内容：Personal Prospect

Hong Kong is an international city known for its openness and multiculturalism. It has always been a global financial center and international trading hub, which has intrigued me. I hope to contribute my knowledge and experience to the financial industry in Hong Kong, to provide more professional and efficient services, and to achieve personal career development and value enhancement.

Personal Outlook

Hong Kong is renowned for its openness and multiculturalism, making it an international city of great appeal. As a global financial center and international trading hub, it has always captivated my interest. My aspiration is to leverage my knowledge and experience to contribute to Hong Kong's financial industry, by delivering more professional and efficient services. Through this, I aim to achieve personal growth in my career and enhance my own value.

中译英：院校：悉尼大学                                     2019/03-2020/12                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           学位：金融学硕士

院校：悉尼科技大学                                       2008/09-2012/07                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           学位：金融学学士

Institution: The University of Sydney 2019/03-2020/12 

Degree: Master of Finance

Institution: University of Technology Sydney 2008/09-2012/07 

Degree: Bachelor of Finance

中译英：中国工商银行悉尼分行                                                                                                                                                         2021/01-至今
（澳洲总部辖有墨尔本等三个二级分行）
运营部
	资金交易：包括外汇、做市商、衍生品、商品、证券和现金转移；
	汇款清算：包括客户的汇入和汇出说明、重新路由SWIFT消息和SWIFT查询消息；
	业务辅助：协助客户经理进行市场调研，及时反馈客户需求和市场变化，为客户提供最佳的资金解决方案；
	市场监控：根据市场情况及时向客户经理提供行业及产品信息；
	风险管控：协助风险管理部门开展相关工作，确保业务操作符合公司风险控制要求，减少风险损失；
	系统维护：公司及个人账户的开设与关闭，涉及敏感类客户及黑名单客户处理，以及所有的信息日常维护；
参与项目：“全球现金管理”、“集约共享运营

Industrial and Commercial Bank of China Sydney Branch 2021/01-Present

(Australia headquarters with three sub-branches in Melbourne)

Operations Department
- Funds transactions: including foreign exchange, market making, derivatives, commodities, securities, and cash transfers.
- Remittance settlement: handling customer remittances and instructions, rerouting SWIFT messages, and responding to SWIFT queries.
- Business support: assisting relationship managers in market research, promptly addressing customer needs and market changes, and providing optimal funding solutions.
- Market monitoring: providing industry and product information to relationship managers in a timely manner based on market conditions.
- Risk management: supporting the risk management department in conducting relevant tasks to ensure business operations comply with company risk control requirements and reduce risk losses.
- System maintenance: opening and closing of corporate and individual accounts, handling sensitive and blacklisted clients, and performing daily maintenance of information.
Projects involved: "Global Cash Management," "Streamlined Shared Operations."

中译英：中信建投证券股份有限公司（深圳）                                                                                                                            2019/10-2020/01
投资银行部
	IPO和再融资和并购重组项目：参与业务、财务和法律尽职调查工作，收集、整理和分析相关数据和信息，评估项目的风险和机会，协助投资者和管理层完成项目审批和实施流程，确保项目能够顺利实施，并达到预期目标；
	研究分析项目所在行业的情况：包括市场规模、竞争格局、行业趋势等，撰写行业分析报告，为投资者和管理层提供参考和决策依据；
	独立撰写招股说明书：包括公司的主营业务、技术创新、产品研发等方面的介绍，以及行业的市场前景、发展趋势、规制政策等方面的分析；
	撰写尽职调查报告：对投资对象进行全面、深入的审查和评估，包括财务状况、经营状况、法律风险、人力资源等方面的评估，为投资决策提供基础和保障；
	撰写项目建议书：提出对项目的意见和建议，包括投资额度、投资方式、投后管理等方面的建议，为投资者和管理层提供参考和决策依据；
	底稿的整理和归档工作：确保项目文档的完整性和准确性，便于后期的查阅和管理。

CITIC Securities Co., Ltd. (Shenzhen) 2019/10-2020/01

Investment Banking Department
- IPO, refinancing, and M&A projects: participating in business, financial, and legal due diligence work, collecting, organizing, and analyzing relevant data and information, assessing project risks and opportunities, assisting investors and management in project approval and implementation processes, ensuring smooth project execution, and achieving expected objectives.
- Researching industry conditions of the projects: including market size, competition landscape, industry trends, etc., writing industry analysis reports to provide references and decision-making basis for investors and management.
- Independently writing prospectuses: including introduction of company's main business, technological innovations, product research and development, etc., and analyzing market prospects, development trends, regulatory policies, etc. in the industry.
- Writing due diligence reports: conducting comprehensive and in-depth examinations and evaluations of investment targets, including financial condition, operational status, legal risks, human resources, etc., to provide a foundation and guarantee for investment decisions.
- Writing project proposals: providing opinions and recommendations on projects, including investment amount, investment methods, post-investment management, etc., to provide references and decision-making basis for investors and management.
- Organizing and archiving working papers: ensuring the completeness and accuracy of project documents for easy access and management in the future.

中译英：中信建投证券股份有限公司 （北京）                                                                                                                           2018/10-2019/01
债券承销部
	撰写公司债或企业债的相关报告：主要包括对发行主体的基本情况、财务状况、债务偿还计划等方面进行分析，并撰写相关报告提交给上级领导；
	参与相关项目的调研和分析工作：对发行主体的市场分析、竞争对手情况进行分析，以便更好地为公司债或企业债的发行提供支持；
	协助联络与对接相关政府部门：协助向中国证监会、中国人民银行等政府部门提交相关申请，并协助处理相关问题；
	学习和跟进行业动态：不断关注市场信息和相关政策法规，并及时反馈给上级领导和团队成员，以便更好地为公司债或企业债的发行提供支持。

CITIC Securities Co., Ltd. (Beijing) 2018/10-2019/01

Debt Underwriting Department
- Writing relevant reports on corporate bonds or enterprise bonds: primarily analyzing the basic information, financial condition, debt repayment plan, etc. of the issuing entities, and preparing related reports to submit to superiors.
- Participating in research and analysis work for related projects: analyzing market conditions and competitors of the issuing entities to better support the issuance of corporate bonds or enterprise bonds.
- Assisting in coordinating and liaising with relevant government departments: assisting in submitting relevant applications to regulatory bodies such as China Securities Regulatory Commission and People's Bank of China, and assisting in handling related issues.
- Studying and keeping up with industry trends: constantly monitoring market information and relevant policies and regulations, and providing timely feedback to superiors and team members to better support the issuance of corporate bonds or enterprise bonds.

中译英：澳洲宝泽金融集团                                                                                                                                                            2017/09-2018/03
投资银行部
	金融信息采集：研究全球各地资本市场和金融市场发展状况、监管机构、交易规则、投资银行业务等方面的信息，包括纽约、澳洲、上海证劵交易所等重要交易所；
	OTC调研梳理：梳理和总结OTC挂牌条件及参与会员要求，深入了解OTC市场的发展状况和规则，包括交易方式、资产类型、交易双方、风险控制等方面的内容；
	参与IPO承销服务：参与为UNITED Networks Limited的IPO承销项目，作为团队成员之一，为该公司取得全额融资。

Australia Bosera Financial Group 2017/09-2018/03

Investment Banking Department
- Financial information gathering: researching the development of global capital markets and financial markets, regulatory agencies, trading rules, investment banking businesses, etc., including important exchanges such as New York, Australia, Shanghai Stock Exchange, etc.
- OTC research and analysis: organizing and summarizing the listing conditions and requirements for OTC trading, gaining in-depth understanding of the development status and rules of the OTC market, including trading methods, asset types, counterparties, risk control, etc.
- Participation in IPO underwriting services: participated in the IPO underwriting project for UNITED Networks Limited as a team member, enabling the company to achieve full financing.
中译英：	在“亚太财经智库”ASIA-PACIFIC ECONOMIC REVIEW 发表文章《How Biden’s New Deal Will Affect  The Australian Economy》
Published an article titled "How Biden's New Deal Will Affect The Australian Economy" in the "Asia-Pacific Economic Review" journal.

中译英：	普通话（母语）
	英语：通过大学英语六级考试；
	粤语；
	闽南语；

- Mandarin Chinese: native language
- English: passed the College English Test Band 6 (CET-6)
- Cantonese: proficient
- Minnan dialect: proficient
